title: Statistics Extraction Tool for GitHub
author: Tavares de Sousa, Nelson
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This software allows to extract statistics from GitHub, by exploiting the data provided by GH Archive. All data for a specified date range can be downloaded and loaded into a Elasticsearch instance. Afterwards, Elasticsearch can be used to extract information.
steps_raw: This software allows to extract statistics from GitHub, by exploiting the data provided by GH Archive. All data for a specified date range can be downloaded and loaded into a Elasticsearch instance. Afterwards, Elasticsearch can be used to extract information.
